arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid SUSPENDED as fans 'throw poo' at Thibaut Courtois
arts.sum: The huge La Liga clash was halted in the 68th minute after Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois complained about objects thrown towards him - including a lighter

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid DELAYED with players leaving pitch as Diego Simeone pleads with fans
arts.sum: Diego Simeone and Koke could be seen talking to the home fans due to crowd trouble.

arts.ttl: Atlético Madrid stars & Diego Simeone intervene as Real Madrid clash halted by referee
arts.sum: Members of both the coaching and playing staff at Atlético Madrid were forced to intervene, owing to the actions of the club’s supporters on Sunday evening. Atlético, of course, are…

arts.ttl: Diego Simeone pleads with Atletico Madrid fans as derby suspended with objects thrown
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid’s derby battle with Real Madrid has been suspended after 69 minutes. Both sides have been ordered off the pitch as part of an unprecedented step taken by match referee Mateo Busquets Ferrer at the Estadio Metropolitano. Eder Militao’s goal broke the deadlock away from home for Los Blancos which triggered chaos in the […] The post Diego Simeone pleads with Atletico Madrid fans as derby suspended with objects thrown appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Watch: Atlético’s fans single two Real Madrid stars out for boos and jeers
arts.sum: The home crowd in attendance at the La Liga showdown between Atlético and Real Madrid on Sunday made clear their grievances with two members of the latter’s squad. The first…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé sends Madrid Derby message to Real Madrid teammates
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé this evening took to social media, to send a message of support to the rest of Carlo Ancelotti’s squad. This of course comes with Los…

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Atletico de Madrid vs Real Madrid, 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: HOW TO WATCH, STREAM MADRID DERBY This Derby represents a golden opportunity for Real Madrid to make a statement in what’s expected to be a very tough, hostile environment for Los Blancos.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe BANNED from attending Real Madrid game after suffering injury blow
arts.sum: Injured Kylian Mbappe would have been hopeful he could be present to cheer on his team-mates against Atletico, but L'Equipe is reporting that the 25-year-old has been ordered to stay away amid security concerns

arts.ttl: Atletico vs Real Madrid LIVE! La Liga match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Injured Kylian Mbappe misses out on his first Madrid derby

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: UDCA Tenerife vs. Real Madrid; Liga F
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Misa, Shei, Lakrar, Rocío, Olga, Teresa, Angeldahl, Eva Navarro, Møller, Linda C., Redondo This time Toril decided for the Møller-Redondo duo and Teresa starts in midfield instead of Toletti once again.
